task_description: Add a live order tracking screen matching the provided design, fix dark mode theme across the app, and enhance mobile UI smoothness with premium animations and micro-interactions.

verification.summary: Build passes with zero errors. All 13 existing tests pass. New route /track/[id] compiles at 5.69kB. All new components (live-order-tracking, live-order-banner, haptic-button, animated-page-wrapper) compile correctly. Dark mode fixes applied across dashboard, account, mobile nav, header, and customer orders. Mobile animations added with framer-motion layoutId on nav, staggered order cards, scroll-linked header shrink.
